name: Applesauce Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the beaten egg to the mixture and stir well.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the applesauce and soda.
4. Gradually add the apple sauce mixture to the shortening and sugar mixture.
5. Sift together the flour, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves.
6. Gently fold the sifted ingredients into the main batter.
7. If desired, stir in chopped nuts.
8. Pour the batter into a greased 10x15 inch pan.
9. Bake at 375°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
Source: Betty Hutson, Stamford (Nebr.) Centennial Cookbook
